response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering background across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: native Japanese proficiency is not indicated, C programming for UNIX is not a demonstrated recent strength, and there is no evidence of Linux kernel modification, MACsec/802.1X, network switch firmware, or chip-vendor SDK experience. The profile is misaligned with embedded LAN-switch security development.
strengths: 15+ years of software development across diverse stacks and domains
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI components)
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos, test tooling authorship)
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel source modification, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware experience
Career focus is web/full-stack/AI tooling, not embedded networking or security firmware

key_factors.factor: Native Japanese language requirement not met
No embedded networking / LAN-switch / kernel security background
Broad senior-level engineering experience and testing rigor
